strengths: Strong Python and SQL ETL/ELT experience
Dashboarding with Tableau and Power BI
weaknesses: VBA and Excel advanced macros not specified
Under 4 years targeted investment risk experience
improvement_bullets: Optimized relational database queries to analyze complex financial datasets, applying financial modeling techniques to reconcile testing data and improve accuracy by 60%.
Developed automated reporting workflows to facilitate investment risk oversight, streamlining data processing for equities, fixed income, and alternative asset classes.
Drafted technical reports and visual presentations for leadership, effectively translating complex data trends into actionable insights regarding market performance and risk.
Utilized Python and Excel to perform ad-hoc analysis on market events, providing stakeholders with clear, data-driven responses to client-specific risk inquiries.
Built and maintained interactive dashboards in Tableau to monitor key performance indicators, incorporating market data and financial product analysis to support portfolio decision-making.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Investment Risk Analyst opportunity with Brown Advisory. I am interested in this opportunity because of Brown Advisory’s commitment to a client-first culture and its reputation for combining sophisticated strategic advice with disciplined investment performance. What interests me about working for Brown Advisory is your focus on developing long-term, sustainable value for your clients, which inspires me because I am dedicated to using data-driven methodologies to ensure that strategic investments are both well-informed and resilient. I believe my technical background in Python and SQL and my experience in building scalable data dashboards would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by translating complex, raw data into strategic business recommendations. In fact, while at Shine Masters, I developed a Python-based automation pipeline for sales and CRM data that replaced manual reporting, saving 8 hours per week and eliminating data discrepancies. Ultimately, I know that the Investment Risk Analyst role at Brown Advisory would allow me to bring my technical expertise to the development of automated risk oversight solutions. Additionally, my role as a Full-Stack Software Developer at Haven Technologies enabled me to develop my financial data reconciliation skills. I collaborated with product managers to optimize relational database queries and clean large datasets, which improved testing data accuracy by 60%. I am excited by the opportunity to use my background in data visualization and modeling in working on investment risk dashboards at Brown Advisory. I know that my proficiency in Snowflake and Tableau and my ability to automate analytical processes align with what it takes to succeed at the Investment Risk Analyst role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
